title: HG Oven, Grill & BBQ Cleaner Spray, Removes Baked-On Food & Grease – 500ml
features: All in one Oven, Grill & Barbecue Cleaner: Removes caked-on & burnt-in grease from ovens, grills, barbecues, cooker shelves & baking trays quickly & thoroughly
Heavy duty degreaser: Our food-safe oven cleaner is also perfect for removing discolouring from stainless steel gas or induction hobs
Tough on muck, gentle on surfaces: Suitable for use on all sorts of metal cooking surfaces, oven seals, cast iron, ceramic, cooking tins, glass & more
Easy to use: Effective spray makes cleaning stubborn food remnants & grease easy – no elbow grease needed! Simply spray, wait & wipe clean
500ml size HG Oven, Grill & BBQ Spray: Effective cleaner for domestic use in the kitchen, or on an outdoor gas or coal cooker, oven or grill
description: Product Description The HG Oven, Grill & Barbecue Cleaner (500ml spray bottle) removes caked-on and burnt-in grease from ovens, grills, barbecues and baking trays quickly and thoroughly. Our easy to use oven and BBQ cleaner removes baked on food and grime in no time. Use it as a baking tray cleaner, grill cleaner, griddle degreaser and oven shelf cleaner, as well as for removing stubborn stains and marks from hobs. Cleaning burnt on food and grease from an oven, grill or baking tray is usually a tough job - but our clever grease cleaner makes it simple and fast. Even cleaning the barbecue is an easier task with our specially formulated, food surface friendly cleanser. There’s no need to scrub your BBQ, oven or hob with this handy all in one spray solution. To clean your (combi) microwave we recommend HG combi microwave cleaner. Includes: 1 x HG Oven, Grill & Barbecue Cleaner (500ml spray bottle) How to use HG Oven, Grill & Barbecue Cleaner: 1. The effect of HG oven, grill & barbecue cleaner is enhanced by heating the oven, barbecue or baking tray to a lukewarm temperature. 2. Spray the surface, leave the liquid to work for 3 to 5 minutes and then clean with a wet sponge. 3. After all the grease has been removed, clean the oven or grill once more with hot water. 4. Repeat the treatment several times for extremely dirty oven trays or barbecue grills. 5. The oven, grill or barbecue is clean again! Avoid contact with the skin and keep this product out of sight and reach of children. We recommend using rubber/plastic gloves and ventilating well during use. Always read the label and product information before use. Ingredients cleaner Safety Warning Danger h314- causes severe skin burns and eye damage. P101- if medical advice is needed, have product container or label at hand. P102- keep out of reach of children. P280- wear protective gloves and eye protection. P303+p361+p353- if on skin (or hair): take off immediately all contaminated clothing. Rinse skin with water [or shower]. P305+p351+338- if in eyes: rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present and easy to do. Continue rinsing. P310- immediately call a poison center or doctor/physician. P501- dispose of contents and container in accordance with all local, regional, national and international regulations. Contains: sodium hydroxide, einecs; 215-185-5, benzenesulfonic acid, c10-13-alkyl derivs., sodium salts einecs 270-115-0. Attention: do not use on untreated aluminium or on the outside of the oven, grill or barbecue. Consult your instruction manual before use. Also avoid the liquid seeping down on to worktops and other surfaces. For (combi-) microwave ovens use HG 'grease away'. Use of HG 'oven, grill and barbecue cleaner' in combination with a high temperature could cause damage to the surface of the appliance. Medical personnel can request the data sheet via +31 (0)36 54 94 777 the consumer's information sheet can be obtained via www.HG.eu Box Contains 1 x 500ml See more
